title: Гўв‚¬ЛњFirst of Its KindГўв‚¬в„ў | Fortescue-Backed Sunshine-to-Green Hydrogen Plant on the Cusp of Starting Production
content:
A Гўв‚¬Е“first-of-its-kindГўв‚¬Вќ plant in Australia that makes green hydrogen directly from sunlight and water without using either electricity or an electrolyser is about to begin production, the start-up behind the project said today (Tuesday).

Sparc Hydrogen, a joint venture between Sparc Technologies, Australian mining giant Fortescue and the University of Adelaide, claims that the world-first pilot project will help decouple the cost of making green H2 from power prices Гўв‚¬вЂќ which typically make up around 70% of the levelised cost of hydrogen (LCOH).
author: Analysts Account
